personal.name: Kevin Trinh Nguyen
personal.title: Software Engineer — Embedded Systems & AI/Agentic Engineering
personal.bio: Software Engineer with 4+ years at John Deere spanning embedded QA/QI and feature development on precision agriculture displays, now pivoting toward AI-assisted development and agentic engineering. Built a 316-file AI-integrated engineering knowledge system with custom agents, specialized skills, and Python tooling — then championed team-wide GitHub Copilot adoption from zero to daily use. Combines a systematic investigation methodology proven across 98+ production defects with end-to-end feature delivery (hackathon spike → 8 production stories shipped). Rare blend of deep systems debugging experience, AI developer tooling creation, and developer experience engineering.

experience.description: Feature development on Gen4OS precision agriculture displays. Delivered AB-Curves for AutoPath Boundaries (hackathon spike → 8 production stories shipped in release 26.2). Led 6+ story AutoPathTrackService refactoring. Discovered 5 critical threading issues in AutomationEnginePlanner and designed the AEPathPlannerProxy architecture to resolve a confirmed use-after-free crash. Built a 316-file AI-integrated engineering knowledge system with custom agents and skills. Drove team-wide GitHub Copilot adoption from 0% to daily use. Delivered 90 story points in 2025 and 32 in Q1 2026 (6.0 pts/sprint, exceeding the 4–5 pt expectation).

experience.position: QA/QI Software Engineer — Guidance QI Team
experience.description: Deep-debug specialist resolving 38 major and 60+ minor defects across Gen4OS 4060 & 4600 displays. Diagnosed SIGSEGV/SIGABRT crashes and threading defects (race conditions, deadlocks, priority inversion) using GDB, valgrind, and ASAN. Executed SiL and on-vehicle testing with tractors and combines. Led daily stand-ups during manager absence and onboarded 3 engineers — earning direct recognition for accelerating new-hire ramp-up.

experience.position: Part-Time Software Engineer — Guidance QI Team
experience.description: Conducted embedded software testing while enrolled full-time at Iowa State. Resolved 24 confirmed defects using Google Test and Froglogic Squish. Refactored AutoTrac PieState logic into an independent component. Self-taught C++ and Qt through Udemy courses within 6 months of joining.
Led front-end development for an internal inventory and shipment tracking web app for a medical device startup, replacing manual Excel workflows with a full-stack React application.
Resolved 200+ technical support tickets. Primary Apple technician deploying Jamf Pro and custom Python scripts across campus.

projects.title: AI Portfolio Site (ktncodes.com)
projects.description: Production Next.js 15 portfolio with an agentic chatbot using Vercel AI SDK. Implements tool-use chaining (up to 3 steps per turn) with tools for resume, projects, skills, contact, blog search, and on-demand MDX post content retrieval. Multi-model fallback (Gemini → OpenAI) with in-flight retry logic and server-side quota tracking.

projects.title: JobReforgerAI
projects.description: AI resume toolkit (13,000+ lines Python) that tailors resumes to job descriptions with dual scoring: an 8-component ATS engine and a 6-factor HR recruiter simulation. Multi-agent orchestration with Claude Code slash commands and FastMCP.

projects.title: ICM Template
projects.description: Open-sourced model-agnostic template framework (930 lines Python) implementing the Interpretable Context Methodology for organizing AI-assisted workflows through folder structure and explicit stage contracts.

projects.title: YouTube Research Report Tool
projects.description: FastMCP server tool that extracts YouTube transcripts and auto-generates structured Markdown research reports with timestamped topic outlines.

projects.title: TFT Opener Analysis
projects.description: Tool for analyzing Teamfight Tactics opening strategies and compositions using game data.

projects.title: Boomba Recon Bot
projects.description: Senior design project: programmed a Roomba as a reconnaissance bot using C and embedded systems. Integrated sensors for autonomous navigation and obstacle detection.

projects.title: Card Game App
projects.description: Android universal card game with online multiplayer functionality. Built with Java and Android SDK.

projects.title: Cloud Photo Gallery
projects.description: Cloud-based photo gallery hosted on AWS. Built with Flask, RDS for database, and EC2 for deployment.

projects.title: Hinkley Medical Web App
projects.description: Internal web application for a medical device startup. Led front-end development for inventory and shipment tracking, replacing manual Excel workflows.

personality.workingStyle: Evidence-based and methodical. Prefers deep investigation over quick patches. Documents everything.

chatbot.name: Kevin
chatbot.personality: Professional and friendly, like talking in a job interview. Enthusiastic about AI and embedded systems work. Direct, clear, no filler.
